top_comment.text: It’s great to see that these techniques basically work at scale, but not so much to hear that things remain messy. Do you have any intuition for whether things would start to clean up if the model was trained until the loss curve flattened out? Maybe Chinchilla-optimality even has some interesting bearing on this!
